name: ClientUsers
description: Linkage table mapping a client user's email to a client company. NOT 1:1 — a user may have multiple rows (multiple companies). userEmail is stored trimmed + lowercased (canonical form used by usePersona() lookups). clientId is a FREE string reference for now — the Clients table does not exist yet (created in a later milestone), so no reference constraint is applied.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: userEmail
columns.description: Client user's email, stored trimmed + lowercased

columns.name: clientId
columns.description: Free reference to a client company (plain string until the Clients table exists)

columns.name: status
columns.description: Invitation/access status of this client user
